name: Worker-Mode-for-Claude-Code
description: orchestrator delegation-judgment plugin: pure-incentive, helps the main session delegate to subagents and record delegation metrics

workerLogPath.description: Absolute path to the unified delegation worker-log jsonl file. plugin.json has no native required-config mechanism, so this requirement is enforced at runtime in two non-conflicting layers: the SessionStart hook (hooks/check-config.mjs) surfaces a NON-BLOCKING reminder via additionalContext if WORKER_LOG_PATH is unset or non-absolute (never blocks the session, preserving the plugin's zero-interception basis), and record-worker.mjs hard-fails before writing a record if it is unset or non-absolute. This field documents the contract; the live value is read from the WORKER_LOG_PATH environment variable.
